_meta.form: TREC 20-17 / 20-18 / 20-19 One to Four Family Residential Contract (Resale)
_meta.method: Self-labeled every AcroForm text field with its own name, rendered all 11 pages at 150dpi (page 2 at 250dpi), visually identified which field name lives at which TREC blank.
_meta.fields_not_labeled_reason: maxLength constraint (State=2 chars, Text7=3 chars, AC numb*=3 chars, 20_2=2 chars, etc.) — field names too long to fit; they still exist but appear blank in this render
_meta.warning: Field names in this PDF are semantically MISLEADING — many were inherited from other contract templates during authoring. The mapping below is by VISUAL POSITION ONLY, not by name semantics. Trust the visual position. e.g. 'the Title Company and Buyers lenders Check one box only' physically renders at the §5.B Option Period day-count blank — that's where it goes regardless of how the name reads.

the_three_we_actually_need.option_period_days__page_2_section_5B: the Title Company and Buyers lenders Check one box only
the_three_we_actually_need.closing_date__page_5_section_9A: A The closing of the sale will be on or before

section_1_parties._note: §1. 'The parties to this contract are ___ (Seller) and ___ (Buyer).' Both blanks have AcroForm fields.
section_1_parties.seller_name: 1 PARTIES The parties to this contract are
section_1_parties.buyer_name: (LIKELY NO ACROFORM FIELD — buyer-side blank rendered empty even after labeling all 184 text fields. Probable signature-only field or coordinate fill required.)

section_2_property._note: §2.A LAND: 'Lot ___ Block ___, ___, Addition, City of ___, County of ___, Texas known as ___ (address/zip code).'
section_2_property._excludes_paragraph_intro: be removed prior to delivery of possession

section_3_sales_price._note: §3 SALES PRICE. The dollar blanks. CONFIRMED VISUALLY.

section_5A_earnest_money_and_option_fee_._note: §5.A: '$ ___ as earnest money to ___, as Escrow Agent, at ___ (address), and $ ___ as the Option Fee to Seller.'

section_5A1_additional_earnest_money._note: §5.A(1): 'Buyer shall deliver additional earnest money of $ ___ to Escrow Agent within ___ days after the Effective Date.'

section_5B_option_period._note: §5.B TERMINATION OPTION: '...notice of termination to Seller within ___ days after the Effective Date (Option Period).' The field name is semantically misleading but it physically renders at this blank.
section_5B_option_period.option_period_days: the Title Company and Buyers lenders Check one box only

section_6A_title._note: §6.A TITLE POLICY: '...Seller's expense an owner policy of title insurance (Title Policy) issued by ___ (Title Company)...'

_other_page_2_fields.title_commitment_deadline: receipt or the date specified in this paragraph whichever is earlier
_other_page_2_fields.title_commitment_acceptable_exceptions: Commitment other than items 6A1 through 9 above or which prohibit the following use
_other_page_2_fields.title_exception_documents_objection_dead: the Commitment Exception Documents and the survey Buyers failure to object within the
_other_page_2_fields.than_3_days_prior_to_closing_date: than 3 days prior to Closing Date

page_3._note: §6 continuation (title, survey, HOA). Self-labeled fields visible: undefined_10, undefined_11, 'The private transfer fee', 'Property Code requires Seller to notify Buyer as follows'.

page_4._note: Page 4 §7 PROPERTY CONDITION. §7.B Seller's Disclosure Notice 'within ___ days' blank labeled 'Within'.

section_9A_closing._note: §9.A CLOSING: 'The closing of the sale will be on or before ___, 20___, or within 7 days after objections...'
section_9A_closing.closing_date: A The closing of the sale will be on or before

section_7D_specific_repairs_treatments._note: §7.D(2): 'Buyer accepts Property As Is provided Seller, at Seller's expense, shall complete the following specific repairs and treatments: ___'

page_6._note: Page 6 §11 SPECIAL PROVISIONS uses Text3 and 'Text3 2'.

page_7._note: Page 7 §13-§20 — almost entirely text + checkboxes. No self-labeled text fields visible above signature line.

footer_initials.seller_initials_p7: (no labeled text field above signature line on this page)

section_executed._note: § EXECUTED block: 'EXECUTED the ___ day of ___, 20___ (Effective Date).'

page_9._signatures: Buyer/Seller signature lines are PDFSignature fields, not text fields. Not labeled by this method.
